devdoc.details: A smart contract for SACCO director elections. The admin registers candidates and qualified delegates. Delegates can vote once per position during the active election period.

deactivateCandidate(uint256).details: Deactivate a candidate before election opens.

getAllPositions().details: Returns all known positions in the election.

getCandidatesByPosition(string).details: Returns all candidate IDs for a given position.

getPositionResults(string).details: Returns full results for a specific position.

hasDelegateVotedForPosition(address,stri.details: Returns whether a delegate has voted for a specific position.

openElection(uint256).details: Open the election for a given number of minutes.

registerCandidate(string,string,string).details: Register a candidate for a SACCO position. Example positions: Chairperson, Treasurer, Director

registerDelegate(address,string,string).details: Register a qualified delegate who can vote.

transferAdmin(address).details: Transfer admin role to another address.

vote(uint256).details: Cast one vote for one candidate in a given position. A delegate can vote only once per position.

winnerDetails(string).details: Returns winner details for a given position.

winningCandidate(string).details: Returns the winning candidate ID for a given position. Can only be called after election closes or deadline passes.
